overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a rainy New York City street at night. The scene features wet pavement reflections, autumn foliage, pedestrians, and the illuminated Oscorp tower visible in the background throughout the walk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with mailboxes and park benches

events.description: Spider-Man begins walking forward from stationary position at crosswalk
yellow taxi passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing park benches and mailboxes

notable_agents.action: man standing near tree checking phone

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light hanging over intersection
tall illuminated skyscraper with Oscorp signage visible in background
wooden and metal park bench on sidewalk
blue USPS mailbox on sidewalk corner
low-rise brick building with large windows

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man begins walking from a crosswalk along a wet city sidewalk at night. The Oscorp tower looms in the background while streetlights illuminate park benches and mailboxes. A yellow taxi passes on the street as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway entrance with political campaign advertisements

events.description: passing green subway entrance railings and stairs descending underground
passing under Queens Dry Cleaning sign spanning the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing walk past subway entrance while observing campaign posters and newspaper boxes

notable_agents.action: woman in coat walking past subway entrance

entered.detail: green metal railings and stairs leading down to subway station
red newspaper vending machine with Daily Bugle branding
blue political campaign poster for Osborn for Mayor
overhead business sign spanning the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past a distinctive green subway entrance with campaign posters for Osborn and Daily Bugle newspaper boxes. The crowd density increases slightly as Spider-Man passes under business signs, with the Oscorp tower remaining visible ahead.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green as Spider-Man approaches crosswalk
Spider-Man steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street
red sedan drives past on the street while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at crosswalk while traffic light is green, passing businessmen on sidewalk

notable_agents.action: businessman in suit gesturing with hands while talking

entered.detail: illuminated orange barber shop sign with spinning pole
white striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt
red car driving along the street

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a wide intersection as the traffic light changes to green. The Tony's Cuts barber sign is visible ahead while businessmen in suits walk nearby. A red sedan passes on the street as the camera moves from the sidewalk onto the crosswalk and back to the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined city street with autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: continuing walk down sidewalk lined with autumn trees and parked cars

entered.detail: trees with yellow and orange autumn leaves lining the sidewalk
tall street light illuminating the sidewalk with warm light

segments.scene_description: The final section shows Spider-Man walking along a tree-lined sidewalk with autumn foliage. Parked cars line the street while the Oscorp tower remains visible in the distance. The wet pavement continues to reflect the streetlights as the walk proceeds through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy New York City street at night, transitioning from a busy sidewalk through a wide intersection toward a tree-lined urban corridor. It begins with Spider-Man walking from a crosswalk past illuminated park benches and mailboxes, while a yellow taxi passes and the Oscorp tower looms in the distance. As the walk continues, the scene shifts past a green subway entrance adorned with campaign posters and newspaper boxes, moving through an increasing crowd under glowing business signs. The camera then follows him across a wide intersection as the traffic light turns green, passing businessmen in suits and a red sedan before reaching the opposite sidewalk near a barber shop sign. Finally, the environment opens into a stretch of sidewalk lined with autumn foliage and parked cars, with the wet pavement reflecting the city lights as the Oscorp tower remains a constant fixture on the horizon.
